name: Sylvan Bladefender
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>葉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>心</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>棒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ブレイド
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Plant-Type monster, send it to the Graveyard. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your Deck. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can add this card from your Graveyard to your hand.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Plant-Type monster, send it to the Graveyard. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your Deck. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can add this card from your Graveyard to your hand.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard: You can excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Plant-Type monster, send it to the Graveyard. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your Deck. If this card is excavated from the Deck and sent to the Graveyard by a card effect: You can add this card from your Graveyard to your hand.

sets.set: Legacy of the Valiant Sneak Peek Participation Card

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the bottom of the Deck
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
